name: east-repair-clean-ocr
description: Clean OCR text should recover the merchant, final total, date, and category.

name: east-repair-messy-ocr
description: Messy OCR should still recover a safe draft without inventing an unreliable date.

description: Merchant and menu cues should classify a coffee shop receipt as meals.

name: uber-trip-ocr
description: Transport vendors and ride language should classify a trip receipt as transport.
